title: Chill's Subtle Armor
description: Resource Pack/Overlay that retextures Minecraft's armor to be less obstructive while still looking realistic.  Works well for both roleplay/cinematic scenes and PvP games alike!
body:
![Image featuring the logo for the pack - a pixel art rendition of a helmet - and text reading "chill's subtle armor"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5625d17a65cbead15e93dc55123965070baa4c34.png)

This resource pack replaces Minecraft's armor textures with new ones that show off more of the player's skin while still being realistic and resembling armor so that the pack works well in PvP settings as well.

If you are making cinematic or roleplay focused Minecraft content where the character/skin design takes priority, this is a great resource pack to show your skin and not looking like an obvious overlay.  Or if you just enjoy seeing more of the skin you've worked hard to design, you'll love this pack!

The current version of this pack works for all 1.21 versions, and the trims are customized to fit the armor, so feel free to decorate your armor with the resource pack on!
